instruction: Fix the color of the yellow highlight ring on this battery icon — it's the wrong shade (off-white).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/battery.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="1" y="6" width="18" height="12" rx="2" ry="2"/><line x1="23" y1="13" x2="23" y2="11"/></g>
  <circle id="halo" fill="#fafafa" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="56" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/battery.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="1" y="6" width="18" height="12" rx="2" ry="2"/><line x1="23" y1="13" x2="23" y2="11"/></g>
  <circle id="halo" fill="none" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="56" />
</svg>
